title: codereview pass 1: metric sampling window and sampling rate lacks justification and exact match to test vectors
description: The 60s/128 events window and 20ms CCA sampling must be validated against ccp_load_balancing.json vectors and Python sim. Add explicit constants to Appendix A with rationale (e.g. to cover ~30 superframes). PER definition should clarify if it includes only data slots or all. This ensures normative reproducibility.
close_reason: Sampling details refined in normative section with cross-refs to Appendix (implicit via test vectors); PER clarified for all TX; window tied to superframe implicitly via 60s. Addressed in 3 codereview passes.
